create.title: Turn Your Story Into a Hit Song
create.subtitle: Start with a moment, confession, memory, or feeling. We will shape it into a structured lyric draft.
create.inputHint: A few vivid details help the song feel personal.
create.inputTooShort: Tell a little more of the story first.
create.emptyState: Your lyrics will appear here after the first draft.

dashboard.title: My Songs
dashboard.noSongs: No songs yet. Create your first hit!

report.subtitleReady: Generated on {date}. Use this report to understand the song's strongest emotional and production opportunities.
report.subtitleMissing: Generate a producer-style report after your song is ready. The report costs 100 credits unless credit checks are skipped in this environment.
report.emptyBody: Generate the report to unlock score dimensions, producer notes, emotional value, hook analysis, and share-ready summary copy.

errors.insufficientCredits: Not enough credits. Please top up.
errors.contentFlagged: This story can't be written. Try a different one?
